content.raw_text: Neon Edge | Module 3: The Fiduciary Pivot Goal: Organize -> Viz: Clickable Detail List -> Justification: Breaks evidence down into statutory triggers. 2. Pivot Slider -> Goal: Compare/Relationship -> Viz: JS-Driven Range Slider -> Justification: Visually represents the 'balancing' nature of fiduciary scrutiny. 3. Tome of Law -> Goal: Inform -> Viz: Sidebar -> Justification: Constant access to statutory text (RUPA 404). Confirming NO SVG/Mermaid. --> The Fiduciary Pivot Conflict: Zeeva vs. Sammy | Status: Loyalty Breach Imminent Internal Affair 📜 Tome of Law RUPA § 404(b) A partner's duty of loyalty includes: (1) accounting for any benefit derived from partnership business... and (3) refraining from competing with the partnership. The Guth Test "If there is presented a business opportunity... in the line of the corporation's business... the law will not permit a fiduciary to seize it for himself." Conflict Intel Z ZEEVA: Architect. Expects undivided loyalty. S SAMMY: Fixer. Claims "it was a side-hustle." I. Shadow Archives Zeeva detected a credit leak. Someone used the "Street Pack" account to buy a Shard. Find the markers of **Self-Dealing** below. Encrypted Ledger Financial flow analysis. Shadow Comms Sammy's chat with a rival. Hardware Specs Is the Shard "Line of Business"? Select an artifact... Explore the data to identify the pivot points of fiduciary duty. Flag as Breach Marker II. The Fiduciary Pivot Loyal Partner Disloyal Usurper Guth Factors Detected Current Scrutiny Safe Harbor No actionable breach detected yet. III. Judicial Data-Dump "Because the Structural Shard was in the firm’s ... Leisure Stream Line of Business , and Sammy used ... Personal Gear Partnership Credits to acquire it without ... Disclosure Logic , he has ... Usurped the Opportunity Won the Deal . The remedy is ... An Apology Disgorgement of Profits ." UPLOAD VERDICT Analysis ACKNOWLEDGE
